card.name: Apple Bloom
card.text: When Apple Bloom enters, put a +1/+1 counter on target creature you control.

card.name: Cozy Glow
card.text: Flash Flying When Cozy Glow enters, if it was cast, you may return target spell to its owner's hand. Your opponents can't cast spells during your turn.

card.name: Daring Do
card.text: Whenever you cast a historic spell, Daring Do explores. (Artifacts, legendaries, and Sagas are historic. To explore, reveal the top card of your library. Put that card into your hand if it's a land. Otherwise, put a +1/+1 counter on that creature, then put the card back or put it into your graveyard.)

card.name: Discord, Lord of Chaos
card.text: Whenever a player loses life for the first time on each of your turns, exile the top card of their library. During each player's turn, that player may cast spells from among the cards they don't own exiled with Discord and mana of any type can be spent to cast it.

card.name: Luster Dawn
card.text: Friendship (When this enters, up to one target permanent gains the following abilities until end of turn.) Whenever you cast a creature spell, put a +1/+1 counter on target creature you control that doesn't share a creature type with it.

card.name: Autumn Blaze
card.text: Ward {2} Whenever a permanent you control transforms or a permanent you control enters transformed, put a +1/+1 counter on that permanent if it's a creature. Otherwise, draw a card.

card.name: Sunny Starscout
card.text: Whenever a nontoken creature you control enters, target player may put a land card from their hand onto the battlefield if this is the first time this ability has resolved this turn. Otherwise, put a +1/+1 counter on up to one target creature. It gains flying until end of turn.

card.name: Evil Clone
card.text: You may have this creature enter as a copy of any creature on the battlefield, except it isn't legendary, is a Villain in addition to its other types and has "Other creatures with the same name as this creature lose all abilities."

card.name: The School of Friendship
card.text: Hideaway 4 (When this land enters, look at the top four cards of your library, exile one face down, then put the rest on the bottom in a random order.) {T}: Add {C}. Unity — {2}, {T}: If there are five or more creature types among non-Human creatures you control, you may cast the exiled card without paying its mana cost.

card.name: Tirek, Devourer of Magic
card.text: Menace, haste Whenever a player loses unspent mana, put that many +1/+1 counters on Tirek. {1}, {T}: Each player adds your choice of {B}, {R} or {G}.

card.name: Starlight Glimmer, Counsellor
card.text: Whenever another creature you control with power 2 or less enters, you may teach. If you do, draw a card. (To teach, pay {2} or exile a Lesson card from your graveyard.) Exhaust — {5}: You may cast a Lesson spell from among cards exiled with Starlight Glimmer without paying its mana cost.

card.name: Magic of Friendship
card.text: Counter target spell that targets you or a creature you control. Scry 1. (Look at the top card of your library. You may put that card on the bottom of your library.)

card.name: Better Way to be Bad
card.text: Convoke (Your creatures can help cast this spell. Each creature you tap while casting this spell pays for {1} or one mana of that creature's color.) You draw two cards and lose 2 life. Sing (Then if you cast this from your hand, exile it and create a Saga token with "r{3}—You may cast a copy of this card from exile without paying its mana cost.")

card.name: Make Our Mark
card.text: Create a white Aura enchantment token named Cutie Mark attached to target creature you control. The token has enchant creature and "If a triggered ability of enchanted creature would trigger, that ability triggers an additional time." Sing (Then if you cast this from your hand, exile it and create a Saga token with "r{3}—You may cast a copy of this card from exile without paying its mana cost.")

card.name: Friendship Bound
card.text: Put a +1/+1 counter on target creature you control, then draw a card for each creature you control with a counter on it. Sing (Then if you cast this from your hand, exile it and create a Saga token with "r{3}—You may cast a copy of this card from exile without paying its mana cost.")

card.name: Raise This Barn
card.text: Search your library for a basic land or Town card, put it onto the battlefield tapped, then shuffle. Sing (Then if you cast this from your hand, exile it and create a Saga token with "r{3}—You may cast a copy of this card from exile without paying its mana cost.")

card.name: Stop the Bats!
card.text: Create a Food token. If this spell was cast from your hand, create a 2/2 black Bat creature token with flying and "Whenever you gain life, each opponent loses 1 life." Sing (Then if you cast this from your hand, exile it and create a Saga token with "r{3}—You may cast a copy of this card from exile without paying its mana cost.")

card.name: The Smile Song
card.text: Until end of turn, whenever a creature you control enters, put a +1/+1 counter on each creature you control. Create a 1/1 white Pony creature token. Sing (Then if you cast this from your hand, exile it and create a Saga token with "r{3}—You may cast a copy of this card from exile without paying its mana cost.")

card.name: Ponyville
card.text: This land enters tapped. Friendship (When this enters, up to one target permanent gains the following abilities until end of turn.) {T}: Add one mana of any color in your commander's color identity.

card.name: A, True, True Friend
card.text: Choose one — • Exile target creature you control, then return that card to the battlefield under your control. • Put a +1/+1 counter on each creature you control. • Destroy target artifact or enchantment. Sing, sing (Then if you cast this from your hand, exile it and create two Saga tokens with "r{3}—You may cast a copy of the exiled card without paying its mana cost.")

card.name: The Perfect Pear
card.text: Support 2. (Put a +1/+1 counter on each of up to two target creatures.) Create a token that's a copy of target creature you control if it has a +1/+1 counter on it, except it's 1/1.

card.name: Awesome As I Wanna Be
card.text: Add five mana in any combination of colors. Sing (Then if you cast this from your hand, exile it and create a Saga token with "r{3}—You may cast a copy of this card from exile without paying its mana cost.")

card.name: Friendship Journal
card.text: Equipped creature has prowess. (Whenever you cast a noncreature spell, that creature gets +1/+1 until end of turn.) Lesson spells you cast cost {1} less to cast. Equip— Teach. (To teach, pay {2} or exile a Lesson card from your graveyard.)

card.name: Discord's Chaos Magic
card.text: The owner of target nonenchantment permanent shuffles it into their library, then reveals the top card of their library. If it's a permanent card, they put it onto the battlefield.

card.name: Play Your Part
card.text: Draw a card. Sing (Then if you cast this from your hand, exile it and create a Saga token with "r{3}—You may cast a copy of this card from exile without paying its mana cost.")

card.name: Top Five Videos
card.text: Whenever you cast a noncreature spell spell, create a colorless Clue artifact token named Video with "{2}, Sacrifice this artifact: Surveil 2, then draw a card." (To surveil 2, look at the top two cards of your library, then put any number of them into your graveyard and the rest on top of your library in any order.)

card.name: Trixie, Great and Powerful
card.text: Spells you cast with mana value 1 or less have demonstrate. (Whenever you cast a spell with mana value or less, you may copy it. If you do, choose an opponent to also copy it. Copies of permanent spells become tokens.)

card.name: Maud Pie, Geologist
card.text: When Maud Pie enters, create a colorless Equipment artifact token named Rock with "Equipped creature has ‘{1}, {T}, Sacrifice Rock: This creature deals 2 damage to any target" and equip {1}. Whenever you sacrifice an artifact, Maud Pie deals 2 damage to each opponent.
